title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!
